component.name: SCX Switcher
component.summary: Qt6 GUI for managing sched-ext BPF CPU schedulers

description.p: SCX Switcher provides a Qt6 GUI for managing sched-ext BPF CPU schedulers on Debian 13+ (Trixie).

Start, stop, and switch schedulers with one click, view live status with auto-refresh, enable boot persistence via scx_loader, and browse a reference of all available schedulers with descriptions and supported modes.
